bottom_line: The fix was clean and well-scoped — the primary process finding is that the regression test suite asserted empty-state CTA marker *presence* but never validated that the href actually resolves, letting this bug class ship undetected.
coverage_notes: Full analysis of all 12 step reports (S01-S11). No raw run logs in .worktrees/I-00079/ai-dev/logs/ — worktree appears not to have been populated with per-step run logs; used step self-reports as secondary evidence. DB telemetry available (DB:UP). S10 fix cycle was triggered by an unrelated pre-existing e2e_seed test failure, not by any code defect in I-00079.

findings.title: Regression suite tested shape, not semantics — the gap that let this bug ship
findings.recommendation: Update the `tests/dashboard/test_empty_states.py` module docstring to explicitly call out that empty-state CTA hrefs require resolve-to-200 checks (not just marker checks). Reference the I003 lesson pattern if it exists as a documented anti-pattern.
evidence: ai-dev/active/I-00079/I-00079_Issue_Design.md:78 — 'The existing regression test `tests/dashboard/test_empty_states.py` asserts the empty-state *markup markers* … but never follows or validates `primary_href`, so a broken target passes the suite (a classic shape, not semantics gap — the I003 lesson)'
ai-dev/active/I-00079/reports/I-00079_S03_tests-impl_report.md:20 — 'All tests use the existing `_primary_hrefs()` helper … and follow the href to verify HTTP 200 — not merely shape checks'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Add a module-level note to tests/dashboard/test_empty_states.py requiring semantic href-resolve checks for empty-state CTAs, referencing the I003 'shape not semantics' lesson; analyzed in I-00079 (see ai-dev/active/I-00079/reports/I-00079_self_assess_report.md). Target file: tests/dashboard/test_empty_states.py. Effort: S.

findings.title: Empty-state CTA hrefs were out-of-scope for CR-00042 — same bug class, two surfaces, one fixed
findings.recommendation: Add a 'check all link surfaces' mandatory review step to the /iw-review-design skill or design doc template: when a CR fixes links in one surface (e.g. help.py _SLUG_TO_DOC), the review must sweep all other href injection points (empty-state CTAs, breadcrumbs, sidebar links) for the same broken-pattern class.
evidence: ai-dev/active/I-00079/I-00079_Issue_Design.md:78 — 'CR-00042 corrected the same class of broken link, but only in dashboard/routers/help.pys _SLUG_TO_DOC map — it never touched the empty_state macro primary_href values in the page templates'
ai-dev/active/I-00079/I-00079_Issue_Design.md:39-47 — the 7 affected primary_href values listed explicitly — residual instances the CR-00042 scope left behind
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Add a 'sweep all href surfaces' checklist item to the /iw-review-design skill so CRs that fix links in one place explicitly check all other link injection points; analyzed in I-00079 (see ai-dev/active/I-00079/reports/I-00079_self_assess_report.md). Target file: skills/iw-review-design/SKILL.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: S11 e2e fixture should be a standing seed fixture — empty-project is a recurring verification need
findings.recommendation: Add the empty-project fixture logic (creates Project(id='empty-test-project') with no child rows) as a standing fixture in scripts/e2e_seed.py so every E2E stack starts with a guaranteed-empty project for empty-state CTA verification.
evidence: ai-dev/active/I-00079/e2e_fixtures/001_empty_project.py:1-37 — fixture created to enable S11 browser verification
ai-dev/active/I-00079/reports/I-00079_S11_BrowserVerification_Report.md:24 — 'The empty-test-project project has no work items, batches, or docs, causing all empty-state panels to render'
The S10 fix-cycle prompt shows e2e_seed was already running fixtures for other items before S11 needed this one
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Add an empty-project standing fixture to scripts/e2e_seed.py so every E2E stack has a guaranteed-empty project available for empty-state browser verification; analyzed in I-00079 (see ai-dev/active/I-00079/reports/I-00079_self_assess_report.md).
